caveats: The runtime kill switch is a prototype governance rail, not an enterprise operations console.
When active, future implementations should fail closed to read-only packet inspection and preserve audit visibility.
Risky write, export, source-promotion, and continuous-voice actions remain independently disabled by capability flags.
guardrails: Runtime policy must be loaded server-side and surfaced in every governed agent turn.
Admin override cannot bypass evidence, source, memory, or artifact review requirements.
Kill-switch activation should stop new autonomous or streaming work before any external action is attempted.
